rulings.Case Title: OSCAR BONETTO, ET AL VS. DOWMAN PRODUCTS, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel Further Deposition And Request For Production Of Documents Of Deft Westside Building Material Corporation'S Custodian(S) Of Records And Person(S) Most Knowledgeable
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, December 14, 2011 in Department 503 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel further deposition and request for production of documents of defendant Westside Building Material Corporation¿s custodian of records and person most knowledgeable is granted. No opposition filed. If a hearing is requested, it will be at 9:30am. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org by 4:30pm stating their intention to contest. If a tentative ruling is contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must bring the proposed order to the hearing. If a tentative ruling is not contested, the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must either bring the proposed order to the hearing or submit it after the hearing in compliance with CRC 3.1312. = (503/TLJ)
